name: 16p13_3_subtelomeric_SD_cluster
description: 16p13.3 subtelomeric SD cluster distal to the alpha-globin locus, containing tandemly duplicated PKD1 paralogs (PKD1, PKD1P1-P6) and RPGR-like repeats. PKD1 lies within a >50 kb SD with ~97% identity to six pseudogenes more proximally on 16p, making PKD1 variant calling notoriously difficult.

architecture.internal_structure: PKD1 spans 47 kb and is duplicated as PKD1P1-PKD1P6 on more proximal 16p13.1 at ~97% identity over exons 1-33; only the 3' end of PKD1 (exons 34-46) is single-copy. Adjacent TSC2 lies head-to-head with PKD1 (PKD1/TSC2 contiguous deletion).
